name: Chicken Alla Spina
recipeIngredient: Whole chicken, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in oil and set aside.
2. Lightly sauté the onions in the same oil.
3. Place the chicken in a roasting pan, layer the onions over it, and sprinkle salt, pepper, and oregano evenly over everything.
4. Cover the pan and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
5. Add the wine over all, then bake for an additional 30 minutes, stirring occasionally to loosen.
Serve with a loaf of Italian bread.
